acholi.soft_landing_desc: I mwaka 3+: doŋo 2–4%, adwoŋ pa wel 1–3%, bedo laboŋo tic <5%
acholi.logged_3_policy_mixes: Icoyo rube me cik 3+ i Yeny me Cik
acholi.monetary_policy: Cik me Cente pa Bank Madit
acholi.household_spending_on_goods_and_servic: Cente ma ot dano tiyo kwede i kom jami ki tic. En aye bute madit loyo i GDP.
acholi.business_spending_on_capital_goods_new: Cente ma cat tiyo kwede i kom jami me tic, gedo manyen, ki alokaloka i kom jami ma kikano.
acholi.government_spending_on_goods_and_servi: Cente ma gamente tiyo kwede i kom jami ki tic (pe kwako cente ma kimiyo calo Social Security).
acholi.net_exports_x_m: Jami ma Kicwalo Woko ma Odoŋ (X-M)
acholi.exports_minus_imports_currently_negati: Jami ma kicwalo woko kunyo jami ma kikelo iye. I kare-ni tye i te bot Amerika (arem me cat).
acholi.percentage_change_in_real_gdp_2_3_is_h: Alokaloka me percent i GDP ada. 2-3% obedo maber.
acholi.measures_average_price_changes_the_mai: Pimo alokaloka me wel ma i dye. En aye lapim madit me adwoŋ pa wel.
acholi.unemployment_rate: Wel pa Jo ma Pe ki Tic
acholi.percent_of_labor_force_without_jobs_na: Percent pa lutic ma pe ki tic. Wel ma kite tye ~4%.
acholi.federal_funds_rate: Wel me Banya pa Bank Madit
acholi.interest_rate_banks_charge_each_other_: Wel me banya ma bank gimiyo kekengi. Man aye jami tic madit pa Fed.
acholi.index_of_500_large_us_companies_proxy_: Kwan me kampuni madoŋo 500 me Amerika. Nyuto kit ma cuk me bad tye kwede.
acholi.survey_of_how_optimistic_consumers_fee: Apeny ma nyuto kit ma jo ma wilo giwinyo kwede maber i kom ekonomi.
acholi.number_of_new_residential_construction: Namba pa tic me gedo ot manyen ma kicako.
acholi.exports_minus_imports_surplus_positive: Jami ma kicwalo woko kunyo jami ma kikelo iye. Amede = malo, arem = piny.
acholi.total_government_borrowing_us_debt_is_: Banya ducu ma gamente oholo. Banya pa Amerika tye ~$34 trillion (2024).
acholi.plots_interest_rates_vs_bond_maturity_: Nyuto wel me banya ki kare ma bond tuco iye. Ka olokke woko = lanyut me dwoko piny pa ekonomi.
acholi.survey_of_manufacturing_activity_50_ex: Apeny i kom tic me cweyo jami. >50 = doŋo, <50 = dwoko piny.
acholi.measures_income_inequality_0_perfect_e: Pimo apoka me lim i kin dano. 0 = rom atir, 1 = apoka madit twatwal.
acholi.the_most_popular_simple_budgeting_fram: Yub me cente ma yot ma dano mapol gitiyo kwede.
acholi.save_a_fixed_percentage_before_spendin: Kan percent moni ma pe lokke MA PEYA itiyo ki cente i gin mukene mo keken.
acholi.zero_based_budget: Yub me Cente ma Doŋ Ziro
acholi.every_dollar_gets_assigned_a_job_incom: Dollar acel acel myero obed ki tic mere. Lim ma idonyo kunyo cente ma iketo woko = ziro atir.
acholi.what_should_you_do_first: Gin aŋo ma myero itim MUKWOŊO?
acholi.why_doesn_t_gas_demand_drop_as_much_as: Piŋo mito pa mafuta pe dwogo piny calo ma itamo?
acholi.why_does_raising_rates_hurt_stocks: Piŋo medo wel me banya balo wel pa bad?
acholi.which_country_has_comparative_advantag: Lobo mene ma tye ki ber me aporre i kom kompiuta?
acholi.what_is_the_most_likely_long_term_effe: Adwogi aŋo ma twero timme i kare malac?
acholi.what_is_the_true_cost_of_grad_school: Wel ADA me kwan me grad school obedo aŋo?
acholi.what_economic_consequence_followed_in_: Adwogi aŋo me ekonomi ma obino i 2021-2022?
acholi.what_will_the_other_station_likely_do: Kabedo me mafuta mukene bitimo aŋo?
acholi.what_type_of_market_failure_is_this: Man obedo kit poto pa cuk mene?
acholi.how_much_should_you_contribute_at_mini: Cente adi ma myero imed, macalo ma nok loyo?
acholi.price_rises_less_demanded_more_supplie: Wel doŋo malo → dano mito nok, lucweyo miyo mapol. Wel dwogo piny → dano mito mapol, lucweyo miyo nok. Aroma: kama S rwatte iye ki D.
acholi.gdp_c_i_g_x_m_consumption_investment_g: GDP = C + I + G + (X-M). Camo Jami + Keto Cente i Tic + Gamente + Jami ma Kicwalo Woko ma Odoŋ. Pimo jami ducu ma lobo cweyo.
acholi.demand_pull_too_much_money_chasing_goo: Ma mito ywayo: cente mapol twatwal lubo jami manok. Ma wel dino: wel me cweyo jami doŋo malo. Ma obedo iye: dano gitamo ni mucara ki wel bimede jwijwi.
acholi.interest_rates_ffr_open_market_operati: Wel me banya (FFR) • Wilo ki cato bond i cuk • Cente ma bank myero gwok • Dirica me holo cente • Lok ma nyuto anyim
acholi.fiscal_vs_monetary: Cik me Mucoro ki Cik me Cente
acholi.fiscal_congress_tax_spend_monetary_fed: Cik me mucoro = Congress (mucoro/tic ki cente). Cik me cente = Fed (wel me banya/cente ma tye i cuk). Gin aryo ducu gimulo ekonomi i yoo mapat.
acholi.divide_72_by_the_interest_rate_to_find: Pok 72 ki wel me banya wek inoŋ mwaka adi ma cente ni bidoko aryo. 72 ÷ 8% = mwaka 9 wek odok aryo.
acholi.elastic_1_luxury_has_substitutes_inela: Lony (>1): jami me dyere, tye ki jami mukene ma leyo. Tek (<1): jami ma mite, pe ki gin ma leyo. Rom (=1): alokaloka me % i P = alokaloka me % i Q.
acholi.perfect_competition_monopolistic_compe: Lweny me Cat ma Opore → Lweny ki Jami ma Pat → Lacat Manok → Lacat Acel. Teko madit i cuk = wel malo, tic maber nok.
acholi.canvas_summary_supply_demand: Cal me miyo ki mito ma nyuto mito, miyo, wel me aroma, romo me aroma, amede, anok, ki adwogi pa mucoro.
acholi.canvas_summary_shortage: Geŋ me wel malo ma tiyo: anok macalo
acholi.canvas_summary_surplus: Geŋ me wel piny ma tiyo: amede macalo
acholi.canvas_summary_tax: Mucoro i kom gin acel acel me
acholi.canvas_probe_hint: Dii i kom cal — nyo ket i kome ka itii ki lagony me arrow — wek iyeny wel ma lawil miyo ki wel ma lacwec tiyo kwede i romo mo keken.
acholi.canvas_summary_personal_finance: Cal me cente ni keni ma nyuto cal me yub me cente pa dwe ki kit ma cente doŋo kwede ki wel me banya ma medde.
acholi.canvas_summary_stock_market: Cal me cuk me bad ma nyuto tekwaro me wel pa kampuni ma iyero, cente ma i dul bad, bad ma imako, ki wel me kare-ni.
acholi.canvas_summary_stock_market_empty: Kabedo me cal pa cuk me bad ma yubbe pi cuk manyen. Cak lanen me cuk wek inen tekwaro me wel ki bad ma imako.
acholi.canvas_summary_business: Waŋ neno me cat ma nyuto cente, nyiŋ maber, wel ki magoba i kom gin acel acel, waŋ aroma, ki tekwaro me magoba pa nino ducu.
acholi.canvas_summary_business_empty: Waŋ neno me cat ma peya oyubbe. Cak cat piny kany wek inen cente, nyiŋ maber, ki magoba pa nino ducu.
acholi.canvas_summary_macro: Waŋ neno me ekonomi me lobo ma nyuto doŋo pa GDP, adwoŋ pa wel, wel me banya, bedo laboŋo tic, aroma me cat, ki tekwaro me cik.
acholi.canvas_summary_inquiry: Yeny me cik tiyo ki lagony me cik aŋwen wek onyut adwogi me makro i yoo me lanen. Ti ki bar me cik ma piny kany wek ipor alokaloka i GDP, adwoŋ pa wel, ki bedo laboŋo tic.
acholi.teacher_prompt_supply_demand: Peny lukwan wek gitam mukwoŋo ka wel, romo, amede, nyo anok aye bilokke, ma peya giywayo layel.
acholi.teacher_prompt_personal_finance: Peny lukwan wek gilwoŋ gin acel ma kiweko i yub me cente, ki tyen lok acel ma weko wel me banya ma medde mino ber ka icako con.
acholi.teacher_prompt_stock_market: Peny lukwan wek gipok wot me wel, te tic pa kampuni, ki peko me dul bad i tito acel.
acholi.teacher_prompt_entrepreneur: Peny lukwan wek gitam kikopo adi ma myero gicat wek gio i waŋ aroma, ma peya giyabo cat me nino meno.
acholi.teacher_prompt_macro: Peny lukwan wek giyer miti acel me cik dok ginyut lapim ma binyuto anyim nyo abalo.
acholi.teacher_prompt_inquiry: Peny lukwan ni lagony me cik mene ma lungec me ekonomi gikwer loyo, ka doŋ gitit piŋo lanen man obedo yoo me pwony keken.
acholi.back_to_stem_tools: Dok cen i jami tic me STEM
acholi.literacy_tooltip: Ŋec me ekonomi doŋo ki tam ma ipwonyo, mwaka ma iloko i lanen, atir me lagam i apeny, ki jami ma inoŋo
acholi.topic_tabs: Wi lok me Ot me Kwan me Cente
acholi.supply_demand_the_price_discovery_engi: Miyo ki Mito — yoo ma cuk noŋo kwede wel
acholi.demand_slopes_down_cheap_buy_more_supp: Cur me mito cito piny (wel nok = dano wilo mapol); cur me miyo cito malo (wel malo = lucweyo cweyo mapol). Wel ki romo me aroma tye kama gikatte iye. Buk pa Adam Smith me 1776, Wealth of Nations, pud obedo te lok.
acholi.personal_finance_budgeting_saving_cred: Cente Ni Keni — yubo cente, kano, ki holo
acholi.50_30_20_needs_wants_save_compound_int: 50/30/20: jami ma mite / jami ma imito / kano. Wel me banya ma medde obedo aura me aboro; cako con ki mwaka 30 i 7% loko $1 odoko $7.61. Cul kredit kad ni ducu — 19% APR obedo wel pa lukwo.
acholi.stock_market_ownership_at_fractional_s: Cuk me Bad — bedo ki bute pa kampuni
acholi.buy_a_share_own_a_slice_of_the_company: Wil bad acel = ibedo ki bute pa kampuni. S&P 500 omiyo magoba ma i dye ~10% i mwaka acel acel i kare me mwaka 100. Pok cente ni i kampuni mapol (pe iket cente ni ducu i kampuni acel), dok imak i kare malac (bedo i cuk kare malac loyo yeny kare maber).
acholi.business_sim_you_re_the_founder: Lanen me Cat — in aye lacak cat
acholi.revenue_costs_profit_break_even_point_: Cente ma idonyo − wel me tic = magoba. Waŋ aroma tye ka cente ma pe lokke doŋ oculle. Cat matino mapol poto i mwaka me 5; jo ma gilaro kwo gunoŋo jami ma cuk mito. Wel me noŋo lawil (CAC) ki wel ma lawil kelo i kare mere ducu (LTV) obedo kwan namba pa lacak cat me nino ducu.
acholi.national_economy_gdp_inflation_unemplo: Ekonomi me Lobo — GDP, adwoŋ pa wel, bedo laboŋo tic
acholi.gdp_measures_total_output_cpi_measures: GDP pimo jami ducu ma lobo cweyo; CPI pimo adwoŋ pa wel; U-3 obedo wel madit me bedo laboŋo tic. Fed keto wel me banya wek orom doŋo ki adwoŋ pa wel — tic aryo ma Congress omiyo bote i 1977.
acholi.policy_inquiry_hero: Yeny me Cik — lagam pe iye
acholi.policy_inquiry_hero_hint: Yel lagony, tam kit ma ekonomi bibedo kwede MA PEYA ikwano, ka doŋ iryem tam ni. Lungec me ekonomi me ada gikwer kekengi i kom lanyut ki dit pa jami magi.
acholi.try_supply_demand: Tem: ket Geŋ me Wel Malo i $30 (geŋo wel me kiro ot). Tam mukwoŋo — jami adi ma cuk bibedo ka rem?
acholi.try_personal_finance: Tem: ket 15% i Balanced ka doŋ iyer bedo ki Lawot me Bedo. Nen wel me lonyo ki cente i mwaka 5.
acholi.try_stock_market: Tem: cat pi nino 5, ka doŋ ipor magoba ni ki tail me Index (mako). Aŋa ma loyo?
acholi.try_entrepreneur: Tem: noŋ waŋ aroma ni ma peya iyabo cat, ka doŋ item wel ma malo ki 50% pi nino acel. Gin aŋo ma otimme bot magoba?
acholi.try_macro: Tem: yer "Dwok adwoŋ pa wel piny" macalo miti ni, med wel me banya ki point 2, ka doŋ imed mwaka acel.
acholi.try_inquiry: Tem: kel cuŋ ki wel malo (adwoŋ pa wel madit + GDP ma dwogo piny) ki yelo lagony manok loyo ma itwero.
acholi.reference_tool_group: Jami tic me kwan i kom ekonomi
acholi.glossary_copied: Kikwanyo coc me nyiŋ lok — ket i coc ni
acholi.play_the_simulations_to_discover_econo: Tuk ki lanen wek inoŋ tam me ekonomi! Gin acel acel ma timme pwonyi tam manyen ma kimedo kany.
acholi.quiz_failed_offline_hint: Cweyo apeny opoto — tem labol me Apeny Matek ma i dyekal me kwan (gitiyo laboŋo intanet)
acholi.ask_any_economics_question: Peny apeny mo keken i kom ekonomi...
acholi.scenario_complete_3: . Labol dok cen doŋ — itwero loyo alubalub ni?
acholi.economic_history_timeline: 📅 Kit Kare me Tekwaro pa Ekonomi
acholi.see_how_inflation_erodes_purchasing_po: Nen kit ma adwoŋ pa wel balo kwede teko me wilo i kare malac. Dollar acel me tin tye ki wel madit loyo dollar acel me diki!
acholi.inflation_rate_percent: Wel me adwoŋ pa wel, percent
acholi.the_economy_moves_through_repeating_cy: Ekonomi woto i alworo ma dok cen jwijwi me doŋo ki me dwoko piny. Ŋeyo kama watye iye i alworo konyowa me tamo gin ma bibino anyim.
acholi.compound_interest_calculator: 📊 Lakwan me Wel me Banya ma Medde
acholi.starting_amount_in_dollars: Romo ma icako kwede i dollar
acholi.compound_interest_is_the_eighth_wonder: "Wel me banya ma medde obedo aura me aboro i lobo." — Albert Einstein (kiwaco ni en aye owaco)
acholi.economists_disagree_different_schools_: Lungec me ekonomi gikwer kekengi! Dul tam mapat mapat gimiyo lagam mapat i kom apeny acel-lu. Ŋeyo tam magi konyi me tamo maber i kom cik me ekonomi.
acholi.markets_range_from_perfect_competition: Cuk cakke ki i lweny me cat ma opore (lucat mapol, jami acel-lu) wa i lacat acel (lacat acel keken, jami ma pat). Dii i kom acel acel wek ipwony mapol:
acholi.gross_domestic_product_measures_the_to: Gross Domestic Product (GDP) pimo wel ducu pa jami ki tic ma kityeko cweyo i te lobo acel i mwaka acel. Man aye kit ma pokke kwede i Amerika:
acholi.as_price_quantity_demanded_consumers_b: Ka wel ↑, romo ma dano mito ↓. Jo ma wilo giwilo nok ka wel doŋo malo. Cur me mito cito piny.
acholi.as_price_quantity_supplied_producers_m: Ka wel ↑, romo ma kimiyo ↑. Lucweyo gicweyo mapol ka wel tye malo. Cur me miyo cito malo.
acholi.where_supply_meets_demand_this_e_point: Kama miyo rwatte iye ki mito. Waŋ "E" man keto wel me cuk (P*) ki romo (Q*) kene.
acholi.changing_the_price_moves_along_a_curve: Loko wel weko iwoto I KOM cur. Jami ma woko (tekniciya, lim, gin ma dano gimaro) LOKO cur ducu kabedo.
acholi.what_s_happening_right_now: 💡 Gin ma Tye ka Timme Kombedi:
acholi.demand_shifted_right_more_people_want_: ▶ Mito olokke i TUŊ LACUC — Dano mapol gimito jami man (gwok lim odoŋo, nyo dano gucako maro). Man tiŋo wel me aroma KI romo me aroma ducu malo.
acholi.demand_shifted_left_fewer_people_want_: ▶ Mito olokke i TUŊ LACAM — Dano manok gimito jami man (jami mukene ma leyo odoko yot, nyo miti pa dano olokke). Wel KI romo ducu dwogo piny.
acholi.supply_shifted_right_producers_can_mak: ▶ Miyo olokke i TUŊ LACUC — Lucweyo gitwero cweyo mapol ki wel manok (tekniciya manyen, wel me jami me tic odwogo piny). Wel dwogo piny, ento romo doŋo malo.
acholi.supply_shifted_left_production_became_: ▶ Miyo olokke i TUŊ LACAM — Cweyo jami odoko tek (can ma a ki i lobo, cik manyen). Wel doŋo malo, ento romo dwogo piny.
acholi.demand_flatter: — ma peredde, LONY loyo: lawil gilokke oyot ka wel olokke (jami me dyere, jami ma tye ki mukene ma leyo).
acholi.demand_steeper: — ma cuŋ malo, TEK loyo: lawil gilokko romo manok ka wel olokke (jami ma mite calo mafuta nyo yat).
acholi.supply_flatter: — ma peredde, LONY loyo: lucweyo gitwero medo nyo dwoko cweyo piny oyot (jami ma kicweyo ki mucin).
acholi.supply_steeper: — ma cuŋ malo, TEK loyo: cweyo pe lokke oyot (ot, poto, kom me kabedo me wer).
acholi.tax_incidence_1: — "but mucoro" yabbe i kin gin ma lawil culo ki gin ma lacat gwoko, dok cat mogo ma onoŋo miyo ber bot jo aryo doŋ pe timme (ARWENYO MA PE DWOGO). Kombedi lawil giyeyo ~
acholi.tax_incidence_3: % — but ma TEK loyo (ma cuŋ malo) aye yeyo madit jwijwi. Yel layel me lony ka doŋ inen kit ma apoka lokke kwede.
acholi.slope_note: 📚 Peredde = lony: dano gilokke matek ka wel olokke (jami me dyere, jami ma leyo). Cuŋ malo = tek: pe gitwero loko kit tim gi oyot (mafuta, yat). Nen aŋa ma yeyo mucoro ka iyelo cur.
acholi.price_elasticity_of_demand: 📏 Lony me Mito i kom Wel
acholi.measures_how_much_quantity_demanded_ch: pimo kit ma romo ma dano mito lokke kwede ka wel olokke.
acholi.goods_luxury_items_products_with_subst: jami (jami me dyere, jami ma tye ki mukene ma leyo) neno mito dwogo piny madit ka wel omede matidi keken.
acholi.goods_necessities_like_medicine_gasoli: jami (jami ma mite calo yat, mafuta) mito gi cuŋ atir kadi bed wel olokke.
acholi.luxury_goods_restaurants_vacations: Jami me dyere, ot cam, wot me yweyo
acholi.revenue_unchanged_by_price: Cente ma idonyo pe lokke ki wel
acholi.cash_flow_warning: ⚠️ Cente ni tye i te ziro — itiyo ki cente makato ma inoŋo. Tem ot ma wel piny, dwok % me keto cente i tic piny, nyo cul banya ni ma peya omede kene.
acholi.months_of_expenses: dwe me tic ki cente ma tye i ciŋ
acholi.emergency_fund_target: lutam giwaco ni myero igwok dwe 3–6
acholi.flow_invested: Okato i keto cente i tic (pud meri!)
acholi.flow_growth: Doŋo pa dul bad (i te keto cente)
acholi.flow_debt_interest: Wel me banya ma kimedo (10% APR)
acholi.last_year_flow: 🧾 Wot pa cente i mwaka mukato
acholi.flow_footnote: * pe obedo but cente i ciŋ — doŋo medde i te dul bad ni; wel me banya medde i te banya ni.
acholi.lower_monthly_cost_flexibility: Wel me dwe piny, ki yot me lokke
acholi.build_equity_but_mortgage_maintenance: Igero lonyo, ento tye banya me ot + gwoko ot
acholi.cheapest_option_save_more: Yoo ma wel piny loyo, ikano mapol
acholi.investment_allocation_of_annual_salary: 📊 Poko Cente me Keto i Tic (% pa mucara me mwaka ma iketo i tic)
acholi.investment_percent_of_salary: Percent pa mucara ma iketo i tic
acholi.describe_what_kind_of_market_you_want_: Tit kit cuk ma imito cato iye. AI bicweyo kampuni 5 me lanen ki cente ma calo me ada.
acholi.e_g_renewable_energy_startups_gaming_c: labol: "kampuni manyen me teko ma dwogo", "kampuni me tuku", "tic me polo", nyo wek nono wek gibed marube...
acholi.investing_concept: 📚 Tam me Keto Cente i Tic:
acholi.index_lesson: 📚 Index ma wilo-ka-mako tye ka loyo cat ni. Lucat mapol ma cato jwijwi ginoŋo magoba manok makato ka onoŋo gimako jami ducu — man aye tyen lok ma weko kimiyo tam me index fund macalo yoo mukwoŋo.
acholi.concentration_warning: ⚠️ Makato 70% pa wel me bad ni tye i kampuni acel keken. Poko cente i kabedo mapol gwoki ka kampuni acel opoto — pok cente ni.
acholi.reset_market_generate_new_companies: ♻ Dwok Cuk Odoco & Cwe Kampuni Manyen
acholi.type_any_business_idea_and_ai_will_gen: Coo tam mo keken me cat ka AI bicweyo wel me cako cat, wel me nino ducu, ki wel ma icato kwede. Ka doŋ itii kwede nino ki nino!
acholi.e_g_food_truck_dog_walking_tutoring_ba: labol: mutoka me cato cam, wot ki gwok, pwonyo lukwan, ot me tedo mugati, cweyo app...
acholi.biz_cash_warning: ⚠️ Cat ni tye ka rwenyo cente — cente tye i te ziro. Nen wel ki magoba i kom gin acel acel: wel ma icato kwede oromo culo wel me cweyo gin acel KI but wel ma pe lokke? Medo wel, ŋolo wel me tic, nyo gero nyiŋ maber aye lagony ni.
acholi.price_per_unit: Wel me gin acel acel, dollar
acholi.below_cost_warning: ⚠️ Wel tye piny loyo wel me cweyo gin acel — irwenyo cente i cat ACEL ACEL.
acholi.high_price_hint: 📚 Wel malo twatwal makato ma kimiyo tam iye — bed ki gen ni mito bidwogo piny (lony me wel).
acholi.shock_oil_lesson: Atura i kom miyo tiŋo wel malo DOK ŋolo cweyo piny i kare acel — dino me cuŋ ki wel malo, calo geŋ pa OPEC me 1973.
acholi.shock_tech: Dony malo me tic ki tekniciya
acholi.shock_tech_lesson: Doŋo me tic obedo cam me nono ma pe noŋŋe oyot: latic acel cweyo mapol, man tiŋo GDP malo labongo tiŋo adwoŋ pa wel.
acholi.shock_financial_lesson: Ka holo cente odoko tek, mito balle: GDP, wel, ki tic ducu poto kacel, calo i 2008.
acholi.shock_trade_war_lesson: Mucoro me kelo jami tiŋo wel pa jami ma kikelo i lobo ni, dok kelo cul cwiny i kom jo ma cwalo jami woko.
acholi.shock_consumer_boom: Dony malo me gen pa jo ma wilo
acholi.shock_consumer_boom_lesson: Gen pa dano yelo ekonomi: ka ot dano giwinyo ni gitye ki kuc, gitiyo ki cente, dok cente ma acel otiyo kwede obedo lim pa ŋat mukene.
acholi.report_spend_up_2: % pa GDP omedo mito (lanyaŋ me Keynes) — ento arem me cente myero oculle i kare mo.
acholi.report_spend_down: 🏛️ Geŋo cente: kiŋolo tic ki cente ki
acholi.report_spend_down_2: % pa GDP, man okwanyo mito woko ki i ekonomi.
acholi.report_tax_up_2: % oweko ot dano ki cente manok me tic kwede, dok mito odwogo piny.
acholi.report_tax_down_2: % oweko ot dano ki cente mapol me tic kwede, dok mito omede.
acholi.report_rate_high: 🏦 Wel me banya makato wel ma i dye ~3% oweko holo cente odoko tek — keto cente i tic ki yero lutic omot (breki me cente).
acholi.report_rate_low: 🏦 Wel me banya ma piny loyo wel ma i dye oweko holo cente odoko yot — mito ma holo cente omedo odoŋo malo (pedal me cente).
acholi.report_okun_2: % ka ipore ki yoo me ~2% oloko bedo laboŋo tic odoko
acholi.goal_missed_inflation: (olokke i yoo ma pe atir — lagony mene ma tiŋo wel me holo cente malo?)
acholi.goal_missed_growth: (gin aŋo ma medo mito — tic ki cente, ŋolo mucoro, nyo holo cente ma yot?)
acholi.goal_missed_unemployment: (Cik pa Okun: bedo laboŋo tic dwogo piny ka doŋo okato yoo me ~2%)
acholi.policy_goal_label: 🎯 Miti me cik (yer acel, tam mukwoŋo, ka doŋ imed mwaka):
acholi.policy_interest_rate: Wel me Banya ma Cik Oketo:
acholi.policy_interest_rate_2: Wel me banya ma cik oketo, percent
acholi.real_rate_note: 📚 Wel ada = wel ma kicoyo − adwoŋ pa wel =
acholi.real_rate_negative: Ka wel ada tye i te ziro, jo ma holo cente giloyo dok jo ma kano girwenyo — man cuko ekonomi matek.
acholi.real_rate_positive: Ka wel ada tye malo, kano cente miyo ber dok holo cente mot — man geŋo ekonomi.
acholi.congress_fiscal: 🏛️ Congress (Cik me Mucoro ki Tic ki Cente)
acholi.spending_change_2: Alokaloka me cente ma gamente tiyo kwede, percent pa GDP
acholi.deficit_note: 📚 Tic ki cente mapol ka igamo mucoro manok = tic ki cente ma pe romo. Cuko ekonomi kombedi, ento banya obedo cul ma bipoto i wi lucul mucoro me anyim.
acholi.economy_reset: ♻ Kidwoko ekonomi odoco i te lok me 2025
acholi.macro_model_disclaimer: Lanen me tuku ma tiyo ki lanyut pa Keynes ma tye i buk pwony ki bedo laboŋo tic pa cik pa Okun — MAN PE obedo tam me anyim. Ekonomi me ada lubo gen pa dano, gen i kom lutela, ki kit ma lobo weng tye kwede, dok lungec me ekonomi gikwer kekengi i kom namba magi (nen Dul Tam i dyekal me kwan).
acholi.gdp_contracting_unemployment_climbing_: GDP dwogo piny. Bedo laboŋo tic doŋo malo. Mito ducu pe oromo.
acholi.rare_and_ugly_high_inflation_low_growt: Pe timme jwijwi dok rac: adwoŋ pa wel madit + doŋo manok. Kit atura pa OPEC me 1970. Tek me yubo.
acholi.growth_strong_but_inflation_spiking_ce: Doŋo tek ento adwoŋ pa wel tye ka tuc malo. Bank madit twero mako breki matek.
acholi.gdp_up_inflation_contained_goldilocks_: GDP odoŋo malo, adwoŋ pa wel kigeŋo. Kabedo ma opore — twero mede pi kare-ni.
acholi.small_net_effect_policy_levers_roughly: Adwogi matidi keken. Lagony me cik gityeko kekengi.
acholi.policy_inquiry_predict_the_macro_outco: 🔬 Yeny me Cik — Tam Adwogi me Makro
acholi.move_four_policy_levers_tax_govt_spend: Yel lagony me cik aŋwen (mucoro, tic ki cente pa gamente, wel me banya, mucoro me kelo jami). Tam kit ma ekonomi bibedo kwede ma peya ikwano. Namba pe, nyuto lagam pe.
acholi.govt_spending_lever: Cente ma gamente tiyo kwede, percent
acholi.interest_rate_2: Alokaloka me wel me banya Δ
acholi.your_hypothesis_which_lever_has_the_mo: Tam ni (lagony mene ma lungec me ekonomi gikwer iye loyo i kwo me ada? Piŋo?)
acholi.e_g_tariffs_hit_prices_fast_but_the_gd: labol: mucoro me kelo jami tiŋo wel oyot ento adwogi i kom GDP lubo ka lobo mukene cula cwiny...
acholi.i_m_stuck_show_open_questions: 🤔 Awil — nyut apeny ma pud tye ayaba
acholi.open_questions_no_answer_key: Apeny ma pud tye ayaba (lagam pe iye)
acholi.what_combination_produces_stagflation_: Rube mene ma kelo "cuŋ ki wel malo"? Piŋo obedo lok matek i kom lutela i mwaka 1970?
acholi.tax_cuts_and_govt_spending_both_stimul: Ŋolo mucoro ki tic ki cente pa gamente ducu cuko GDP. Mene ma kelo adwoŋ pa wel madit i dollar acel acel me cuko? Piŋo?
acholi.when_would_a_central_bank_deliberately: I kare aŋo ma bank madit twero KELO dwoko piny pa ekonomi ki tam mere? (Volcker 1979–82.)
acholi.do_tariffs_help_domestic_workers_in_th: Mucoro me kelo jami konyo lutic me lobo-ni i kare malac, nyo tiŋo wel bot dano weng? Gin aryo ducu? Gin aŋo ma kiweko, dok kwene?
acholi.this_widget_hard_codes_textbook_keynes: Jami tic man tiyo ki lanyut pa Keynes ma tye i buk pwony keken. Lanyut mene ma bilokke ka itiyo ki ekonomi me but miyo? Ka itiyo ki MMT? Ka itiyo ki klasikal manyen (gen ma lubo ryeko)? Kwene ma lanen pa Keynes miyo iye lanyut ma pe atir i namba me lobo me ada?
acholi.i_can_explain_why_this_policy_mix_yiel: Atwero tito piŋo rube me cik man kelo kit ekonomi man.
acholi.inquiry_widget_no_score_no_reveal_no_a: Jami tic me yeny — namba pe, nyuto lagam pe, cwalo lagam pe. Namba ma kitiyo kwede obedo me pwony keken, PE obedo lanen me makro me ada; adwogi me ada lubo cik me cente, teko ma pud pe kitiyo kwede, gen pa dano, ki cat ki lobo mukene. Makro obedo lok ma dano gikwer iye — lungec me ekonomi gikwer i kom lanyut ki dit pa jami magi.
